name: Easter Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 c Peanut Butter or Coconut Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the butter and cream cheese together.
2. Mix in the salt, vanilla extract, peanut butter or coconut oil, and confectioner's sugar until well combined.
3. Form the mixture into egg-shaped balls.
4. Place the balls in the refrigerator to chill until firm.
5. Dip the chilled balls into melted chocolate coating.
